seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Popanyinning and West Swan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Popanyinning vs West Swan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Popanyinning and West Swan.
heading: West Popanyinning vs West Swan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Popanyinning, Western Australia and West Swan, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Popanyinning has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to West Swan (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Popanyinning or West Swan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Popanyinning has a flood risk score of 43/100, while West Swan scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Popanyinning scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. West Swan scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Popanyinning or West Swan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Popanyinning has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
